parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ source: 'n8n-error-trigger', error_message: ($json.execution && $json.execution.error && $json.execution.error.message) || 'Unknown error', payload: { workflow_id: ($json.workflow && $json.workflow.id) || '', workflow_name: ($json.workflow && $json.workflow.name) || '', execution_id: ($json.execution && $json.execution.id) || '', last_node: ($json.execution && $json.execution.lastNodeExecuted) || '' } }) }}

meta.notes: Error handler for lead-qualification workflow (ID: xvELzDTdQQalTn4b). Requires FASTAPI_INTERNAL_URL env var in n8n.
